title: BionIT Labs – Demo Unit Quiz
description: Test your understanding of the Demo Unit system, components, and clinical usage.

questions.prompt: What is the primary purpose of the BionIT Labs Demo Unit?
options: To demonstrate Adam’s Hand functionality in a controlled environment
To replace the full prosthetic system
To calibrate electrodes for long-term patient use
To store patient data

questions.prompt: Which component allows the Demo Unit to simulate hand opening and closing?
options: The MyoLogic Pro controller
The ThunderCell battery
The internal motor and actuator system
The electrode test pads

questions.prompt: What is the correct power source for the Demo Unit?
options: A standard USB-C power supply
The ThunderCell rechargeable battery
A 9-volt alkaline battery
Direct connection to Adam’s Hand

questions.prompt: During a demonstration, what should the clinician verify before activating the hand?
options: That the Demo Unit is connected to Wi-Fi
That the motor housing is securely closed and unobstructed
That the patient has completed electrode calibration
That the ThunderCell is fully charged

questions.prompt: Which statement best describes the Demo Unit’s role in clinical education?
options: It replaces hands-on prosthetic training
It provides a safe, portable way to demonstrate Adam’s Hand mechanics
It is only used for internal engineering testing
It is required for all prosthetic fittings
